title: backend: helm: Mark failed install verification
author: harrshita123

findings.description: VerifyUser returns error instead of bool, preserving the failure reason to the status cache — idiomatic Go error propagation.
All three error paths in VerifyUser now log 'verifying user' consistently (previously all said 'getting chart').
TestInstallRelease_VerifyUserFailureSetsFailedStatus sets up processing state, triggers failure, and asserts both failed status and error string preservation.
Commit 'backend: helm: Mark failed install verification' uses correct three-part format with SubArea and capitalized verb.
